title: The Promise to Grow Stronger
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Usopp, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–5.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Usopp, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: East Blue; atop an enormous bridge

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are, after all, the sole Survivor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The Supreme Commander of the Revolutionary Army...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Such a strange twist of fate.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: under the orders of the tenryubito.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Grand Line: Momo island - Kamabaka Kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the vanted poster of the strawhat- boy.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This is the King of Snippers, Sogeking.
